title: MEP Quantity Surveyor (Junior to Mid-Level)
description:
Job Summary

We are a growing engineering and building services company seeking a responsible and motivated MEP Quantity Surveyor to support our project and tender operations. The successful candidate will be involved in tender pricing, cost control, subcontractor coordination, and project support for Mechanical and Electrical works. This role is suitable for candidates looking for long-term career development with opportunities to progress into senior commercial positions.

Responsibilities

  • Prepare and submit bidding, tendering, and quotation documents to secure project contracts
  • Perform quantity take-offs and develop accurate cost estimations based on drawings and specifications to support competitive tendering
  • Assist in project and site supervision to ensure timely and efficient execution of Mechanical and Electrical works
  • Verify and validate materials purchase orders, delivery orders, and invoices to maintain accurate project records and cost control
  • Coordinate and manage subcontractors and suppliers to ensure alignment with project schedules and quality standards
  • Monitor project costs, variations, and claims to identify financial risks and support budget adherence
  • Prepare progress claims and assist in final account settlements to facilitate timely payments and project closure
  • Liaise effectively with consultants, main contractors, and internal teams to ensure smooth communication and project delivery

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Quantity Surveying, Building Services, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or related field
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant working experience preferred
  • Knowledge of Singapore construction and tender process
  • Ability to read and interpret Mechanical and Electrical drawings and specifications
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel for data analysis and reporting
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment
  • Site experience is an advantage

Other Information

  • Salary Range: SGD 2,500 – 3,500 (commensurate with experience)
  • Employment Type: Full-Time
  • Working Location: Singapore
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days work week (or adjust if needed)

Benefits

  • Annual leave and medical benefits in accordance with MOM regulations
  • Performance-based bonus
  • Structured career progression
  • Exposure to full project lifecycle (tender to completion)
  • Profit-sharing opportunity upon promotion to senior roles, subject to company performance and eligibility
